name: zig-monitor-bot
description: Telegram bot for ZIG blockchain wallet and staking monitoring

scripts.test:db: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const db = require('./src/db'); db.init().then(() => db.query('SELECT 1 AS ok')).then(r => { console.log('DB connected:', r.rows[0]); return db.close(); }).then(() => process.exit(0)).catch(e => { console.error('DB failed:', e.message); process.exit(1); })"
